data.title: Kled AI Unveils Comprehensive Tokenomics Design for KLED
data.description:
Kled AI founder Avi Patel has announced the complete tokenomics design for KLED, aiming to enable non-L1 tokens to accumulate value similar to L1 tokens as network transaction volumes increase. According to Foresight News, the core mechanism involves triggering buybacks and burns with each transaction. When users convert their balance into XP within the app to upgrade account levels and unlock higher reward tasks, Kled uses 100% of the amount for market buybacks of KLED, with 50% permanently burned and 50% reserved for buying.

Additionally, the Universal Fraud Detection Protocol is a decentralized data verification network powered by KLED. Users can earn KLED rewards by completing real data verification tasks through extensions. The verification results are used for high-quality data training in AI labs, enhancing platform data quality.

Long-term equity binding is also part of the design. Nitrility Inc., Kled's parent company, has partnered with the Street Foundation to reserve up to 10% equity to indirectly benefit the KLED community through an SPV. All buybacks and transaction fees will be used to increase SPV equity, with Street DAO deciding the use of funds upon company exit.

data.title: Hyperliquid Whale Positions Reach $3.618 Billion
data.description:
Hyperliquid platform whales currently hold positions valued at $3.618 billion, according to ChainCatcher. Data from Coinglass reveals that long positions account for $1.835 billion, representing 50.73% of the total, while short positions amount to $1.783 billion, making up 49.27%. Long positions have incurred a loss of $7.0002 million, whereas short positions have seen a loss of $19.5604 million.

Notably, a whale address, 0x0ddf..02, has taken a 3x leveraged short position on Bitcoin at a price of $67,992.1, currently facing an unrealized loss of $9.7079 million.

data.title: Trump to Deliver Keynote at Gala for Top TRUMP Holders
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is set to deliver a keynote address at a gala event for the top 297 holders of Official Trump (TRUMP) on Saturday, according to NS3.AI. The event will be held at Mar-a-Lago, with the top 29 holders also eligible for a private reception. However, the event terms indicate that Trump may not be able to attend, and the event could be canceled for any reason.

data.title: BIT: $73,000 is a significant watershed for BTC and a key threshold for confirming a reversal of this trend.
data.description: BIT released its weekly report, stating that in the previous two Biton Target reports, we indicated that the Bitcoin bear market might be nearing its end. Signals across multiple timeframes are gradually converging, supporting this assessment. When this assessment was made, Bitcoin was approaching the downtrend line formed since the start of the bear market in October 2025, just one step away from an upward breakout. Simultaneously, the weekly stochastic oscillator fell to its lowest level since January 2023, near the cyclical bottom following the end of the 2021/2022 bear market. Historically, this indicator reading often corresponds to market bottoms. Our Bitcoin trend model has turned bullish. Trend signals don't always materialize, but given Bitcoin's strong trend and high volatility, and after the two previous rapid reversals, the current upward movement has more potential for continuation. Furthermore, the Bitcoin price is gradually approaching the 21-week moving average, a key dividing line in our bull/bear market analysis framework. The $73,000 level has been a significant watershed since March 2024 and a key threshold for confirming a reversal in this trend. Bitcoin has recently been consolidating around $70,000. A sustained break and hold above $73,000 would further confirm the reversal signal. While current indicators are generally positive, the upward momentum may still be affected by short-term risk factors before the price reaches the target range, requiring close monitoring.

data.title: Foreign Ministry: China firmly opposes the US's smear campaign against China's achievements in the development of the artificial intelligence industry.
data.description: In response to US accusations that China "stole" intellectual property from US artificial intelligence laboratories, Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun stated at a regular press conference on the 24th that the US claims are baseless and a slanderous smear against China's achievements in the development of its artificial intelligence industry. China firmly opposes this. We urge the US to respect the facts, abandon its prejudices, stop its technological suppression of China, and do more to promote technological exchanges and cooperation between the two countries. (Xinhua)

data.title: China's Fiscal Policies Show Progress in Boosting Domestic Demand
data.description: On April 24, Li Nan, Deputy Director of the Financial Department of China's Ministry of Finance, stated at a press conference that the comprehensive policy package aimed at boosting domestic demand has progressed as expected in the first quarter. According to Jin10, the policies have gradually shown their effects, achieving phased success in supporting credit issuance, stimulating private investment, and promoting consumer spending. The initiatives have benefited 2.71 million businesses and 54.19 million consumers.

data.title: OKX launches the 8th "AI Special" session of its Play & Earn Strategy Trading Program, with a total prize pool of 1 million USDT.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's 8th "AI Special" trading strategy event has officially begun, running from now until April 30th at 23:59 (GMT+8). During the event, new users who deposit 10 USDT can receive a 100 USDT airdrop position, and those who complete 100 USDT of spot trading will receive an additional 20 USDT. Additionally, both new and existing users who trade 10,000 USDT or complete 5,000 USDT of trading volume through the Agent Trade Kit will have the opportunity to receive rewards such as 2,000 USDT, 5 million large model tokens, and a Claude Pro membership.

data.title: Experts say the US government is internally divided, and Trump is in a difficult position.
data.description: As the US-Israel war against Iran continues, the Trump administration is clearly divided on how to proceed. Andrea Dressi, Assistant Professor of International Relations and Global Politics at the University of Rome, stated: “We see the US objectives constantly shifting, the strategy constantly changing, and the goals constantly being adjusted. Although the Trump administration tries to ‘show strength’ through social media, in reality, we are seeing increasing divisions within the government, as well as the dismissal of several high-ranking officials at the Pentagon and Department of Defense. All of this reinforces the analysis that the US and Israel launched this war based on ‘a serious misjudgment of the potential consequences of this conflict or a lack of strategic thinking.’ Therefore, we are now in this stalemate, and in a sense, the Trump administration is seeking an exit strategy.” (Jin Shi)

data.title: Morgan Stanley launches stablecoin reserve fund
data.description: Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) has officially launched the "Stablecoin Reserve Portfolio" (MSNXX), a government money market fund designed specifically for stablecoin issuers. It invests exclusively in highly liquid instruments such as U.S. Treasury bonds and government securities repurchase agreements, targeting a net asset value of $1 and providing daily liquidity. This initiative aims to provide stablecoin issuers with a compliant, low-risk reserve asset custody solution. (CoinDesk)

data.title: U.S. and Israel Face Internal Divisions Amid Ongoing Conflict with Iran
data.description:
The ongoing conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran has highlighted internal divisions within the Trump administration. According to Odaily, Andrea Dressi, an assistant professor of International Relations and Global Politics at Roma University, noted that the U.S. objectives and strategies are constantly shifting. Despite efforts by U.S. President Donald Trump to project strength via social media, internal disagreements are becoming more pronounced, with several high-ranking officials in the Pentagon and Department of Defense being dismissed.

Dressi suggests that these developments reinforce the analysis that the U.S. and Israel's decision to engage in this conflict may stem from a significant misjudgment of the potential consequences or a lack of strategic foresight. As a result, the situation has reached a stalemate, and the Trump administration is reportedly seeking an exit strategy.

data.title: Spain's March PPI Annual Rate Shows Increase
data.description: Spain's Producer Price Index (PPI) for March recorded an annual rate of 3.4%, according to Jin10. This marks a significant change from the previous value of -7.00%.

data.title: Binance Set to Launch Alpha Airdrop with Tiered Rewards
data.description:
Binance announced on X that the Alpha airdrop event is scheduled for today at 17:00 (UTC+8). This event will utilize an upgraded 'Alpha Blind Box' model, featuring tokens from multiple projects within the airdrop pool. Users holding at least 228 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to claim a token reward on a first-come, first-served basis. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points.

The airdrop is structured into three reward tiers: Common (comprising 80% of the pool), Rare (15%), and Hidden (5%). Each tier corresponds to different values of the Alpha Blind Box. Upon claiming, users will be assigned to one of these tiers, and rewards will be distributed according to the tier proportions. If the rewards are not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes. This tiered approach aims to provide varied incentives for participants, encouraging engagement and maximizing the distribution of rewards across the community.

data.title: Kazakhstan's Central Bank Considers Future Rate Cuts Amid Current Trends
data.description: Kazakhstan's Central Bank has indicated that it may consider the possibility of future interest rate cuts if the current economic trends persist and no new shocks occur. According to Jin10, the bank's statement reflects its cautious approach to monetary policy, aiming to balance economic stability with growth objectives. The central bank is closely monitoring the economic indicators and external factors that could influence its decision-making process. This consideration comes as part of the bank's ongoing assessment of the economic environment and its commitment to maintaining a favorable monetary policy stance.

data.title: Binance: The Binance Alpha airdrop can be claimed at 17:00 today. The airdrop threshold is 228 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available for claiming and trading starting today at 17:00 (UTC+8). This event uses an upgraded "Alpha Blind Box" model, with the airdrop prize pool containing tokens from multiple projects. Users holding at least 228 Binance Alpha Points can claim a token reward once. First come, first served. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points. This airdrop has three reward tiers: Regular (80% of the prize pool), Rare (15%), and Hidden (5%), each corresponding to a different Alpha Blind Box value. Users will be assigned to one of these tiers upon claiming, and rewards will be distributed proportionally based on these tiers. If rewards are not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes.

data.title: Bitget integrates with Market Prophit: Launches AI-powered social copy trading feature, supporting reverse copy trading strategies.
data.description: Bitget announced a strategic partnership with crypto data intelligence platform Market Prophit to jointly launch an AI-driven social trading tool. This feature, powered by Market Prophit's AI engine, scans massive amounts of data on the X platform in real time and combines this with a comprehensive score based on the past market prediction performance of relevant accounts. This helps users more efficiently identify high-quality trading signals and execute strategies directly within the platform. The tool supports a two-way trading mechanism, allowing users to automatically follow high-quality social trading accounts or reverse-trade accounts with significant long-term prediction deviations. By transforming unstructured social media sentiment into systematic and actionable trading strategies, it further improves the complete decision-making chain from information capture and signal screening to one-click trading. Market Prophit CEO Igor Gonta stated that price fluctuations in the crypto market are often highly correlated with social media sentiment. This collaboration aims to transform complex and fragmented market sentiment into quantifiable and tradable standardized indicators, providing users with a more systematic trading reference and helping them capture more diverse strategic opportunities in volatile markets.

data.title: AI TRENDS | DeepSeek V4 Preview Release Sparks Dispute on Polymarket
data.description:
DeepSeek has announced the release of the preview version of DeepSeek-V4. According to Odaily, this announcement has led to a dispute on Polymarket regarding the official release date of DeepSeek V4, resulting in three rounds of UMA arbitration.

The controversy stems from the settlement rules, which specify that only versions representing the core evolution of the DeepSeek V series and clearly positioned as successors to DeepSeek-V3 are eligible. Other models, such as derivative models like 'V4-Lite' and 'V4-Mini', task-specific models, R series inference models, and experimental or preview versions like 'V4-Exp' and 'V4-Preview', do not qualify unless they are positioned as new flagship models of the V series.

Opponents argue that the version released today is the V4-Preview, not the official V4, and therefore the statement 'DeepSeek V4 was released on April 24' should be settled as NO instead of YES.

data.title: LayerZero OApps Vulnerability Puts Billions at Risk
data.description: On April 24, CoinGecko reported that a significant portion of LayerZero OApps remains vulnerable due to their current security configuration. According to BlockBeats, 47% of these applications still use a 1-of-1 DVN setup, leaving over $4.5 billion exposed to risks similar to those that led to the $292 million attack on Kelp DAO. This vulnerability highlights ongoing security concerns within the blockchain ecosystem.

data.title: India Responds to U.S. President Trump's Social Media Post
data.description: India has expressed strong disapproval of a social media post shared by U.S. President Donald Trump, which described the country as a 'hellhole.' Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the diplomatic tensions arising from the comment. The post has sparked a wave of criticism from Indian officials, who have called the description inaccurate and offensive. This incident adds to the ongoing complexities in the relationship between the two nations, which have been navigating various geopolitical and economic challenges.

data.title: BTC Short Position Closed with Minor Profit, New Sell Order Placed
data.description:
On April 24, recent monitoring by Hyperinsight revealed that a prominent BTC short seller, active in the Hyperliquid market, closed a near break-even short position. According to BlockBeats, the position was closed at an average price of $77,936, previously valued at $15.58 million, resulting in a small profit of $60,000.

Following this, the same address placed a limit sell order for 100 BTC at a price above the current market value, specifically at $79,000, totaling approximately $7.9 million. The plan is to reopen the short position once the price reaches this level.

Address: 0x004edcd40360e293e4cf260d2ebdf8c7076c1bb8

data.title: Cetus Terminal Updates Enhance Integration with Aggregator Services
data.description: Cetus, a liquidity protocol within the Sui ecosystem, has announced an update to its Cetus Terminal, according to Foresight News. The update synchronizes the terminal with the latest services of the Cetus Aggregator. This enhancement allows DApps, developers, and web integrations using Cetus Terminal to automatically access the latest routing and optimized pricing. The integration process has been streamlined to be more lightweight and plug-and-play.
